title: fix(#4402):missing sign while for loop iteration variable is signed

features.name: signed for loop iteration variable
features.description: Code should include a for loop where the iteration variable is declared as signed (e.g., reg signed [2:0])
features.snippet:
reg signed [2:0] forvar14;
for (forvar14 = 0; forvar14 < 1; forvar14 = forvar14 + 1) begin end
